title: What is the difference between HashMap and HashTable?
content: Explain the key differences between HashMap and HashTable in Java. Cover aspects like synchronization, null key/value handling, performance characteristics, and when to use each one. Also mention ConcurrentHashMap as a modern alternative.

title: Explain Spring Boot auto-configuration mechanism
content: How does Spring Boot auto-configuration work under the hood? Walk through the role of @SpringBootApplication, @EnableAutoConfiguration, spring.factories / AutoConfiguration.imports, and conditional annotations like @ConditionalOnClass.

title: What is a Binary Search Tree?
content: Describe the properties of a Binary Search Tree (BST). Cover insertion, deletion, search operations, and their time complexities. Explain the difference between balanced and unbalanced BSTs, and mention self-balancing variants like AVL and Red-Black trees.

title: Design a URL shortener like bit.ly
content: Walk through the system design of a URL shortening service. Cover: functional requirements, API design, database schema, hash/ID generation strategies (base62, MD5 truncation), read-heavy optimization, caching layer, analytics tracking, and scalability considerations.

title: Explain the difference between INNER JOIN and LEFT JOIN
content: Describe how INNER JOIN and LEFT JOIN work in SQL with examples. When would you use each? Include a visual representation and discuss performance implications with large tables.
